Deductions -$347.79 Vehicle license fee -$1.26 Rental tax -$50.53 Base rental rate -$296.00 Your weekly rental rate covers the cost of your car, as well as things like mileage and maintenance. Final balance: Your earnings after deductions. Booked distance: The total distance you spent giving rides—from accepting a ride to drop-off. Booked time: The total time you spent giving rides—from accepting a ride to drop-off. Online time: The total time you spent online, including time when you were waiting for rides. Earnings: The amount you made before any deductions. This includes ride earnings, tips, tolls, pass-throughs, and bonuses. Deductions: Fees deducted from your earnings such as Express Pay and Express Drive.
